AtmoNet
Dashboard Contribute API Docs

API Documentation

Integrate hyperlocal weather data into your applications with our REST API.

Base URL: https://atmosnet-backend.onrender.com
POST /v1/observations/

Submit Observation

Submit a barometric pressure observation from a device. Returns confidence score and points awarded.

Request Body
{ "device_id_hash": "abc123...", "pressure_hpa": 1013.25, "latitude": 6.5244, "longitude": 3.3792, "altitude_m": 50.0 }
Response
{ "id": "uuid-string", "confidence_score": 90, "tier": "A", "points_awarded": 10 }
GET /v1/observations/{device_id}/recent

Get Recent Observations

Retrieve recent observations for a specific device.

Response
{ "observations": [ { "id": "uuid", "pressure_hpa": 1013.25, "timestamp": "2026-03-29T12:00:00Z", "points_awarded": 10 } ] }
GET /v1/observations/stats/network

Get Network Statistics

Get aggregated statistics for the entire network over the last 24 hours.

Response
{ "total_observations_24h": 125000, "active_devices": 12450, "average_confidence": 94.2, "tier_breakdown": { "A": 85000, "B": 30000, "C": 10000 } }
GET /v1/rewards/balance/{device_id}

Get Rewards Balance

Get the current AtmosPoints balance and total earnings for a device.

Response
{ "balance": 250, "total_earned": 1500, "total_redeemed": 1250, "current_streak": 7 }

Response Codes

Code Meaning
200 Success
201 Created (observation submitted)
400 Bad Request (invalid data)
401 Unauthorized
429 Rate Limited (1 observation per 5 minutes per device)

API Pricing

Free

$0/month
  • 1,000 API calls/day
  • 5km resolution
  • Current conditions
  • Basic forecast
  • Community support

Standard

$299/month
  • 100,000 API calls/day
  • 1km resolution
  • 72-hour forecast
  • Historical data

Enterprise

Custom

AtmosNet API v1.0 - Base URL: https://atmosnet-backend.onrender.com
